prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response:
Here's an opening paragraph:

In the deepest, bluest part of Coral Reef Canyon, there lived an octopus named Oliver who was the shyest creature in all the ocean. While other sea animals swam and played together, Oliver would quietly hide among the rocks, his soft purple tentacles curled tightly around himself. He watched the colorful fish dart back and forth and the playful dolphins leap through the waves, wishing more than anything that he could join them. But every time someone came near, Oliver would quickly change colors—blending into the rocks—and shrink back into his small, safe space.
